violations.description: General employee practices. — --Employee failed to maintain a high degree of personal cleanliness or observe proper hygienic practices. -Server cleared plates for dishwash station and then used sani bucket wipe to wash hands. *Corrected on-site. Redirected to proper hand wash at hand sink.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -In-use knife was stuck into crack next to burger station on side 1 cook line.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at underside of medicine drawer handle. -Grease residue build up on sides of fryers. -Grease build up at bottom exterior of cook line upright freezer. -Minimal residue at underside surfaces of 3 handles of server side refrigeration doors. -Some dust/debris at walk in cooler fans.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Some dust/debris at ceiling tiles and ceiling vents above cook line.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Grout is worn below dish pit and sporadically throughout kitchen. -Floor/wall trim tile is broken at exterior corner of walk in freezer. *Fresh grout is currently planned for install on Christmas Eve.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Multiple items at Cook side 1 and 2 had top food temperatures up to 58F. *Ensure foods are kept below the "cold line" and /or in smaller portions at the top rail of the cook line and be sure to close lids/cover product whenever able.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
